name: spectral_instrumentalism
text: You're just confusing what is useful with what is true. A model being practical doesn't make it metaphysically necessary, and the mechanism explains function, not necessity.

name: aggressive_poster
text: This is obviously stupid and anyone defending it is a clown. You people always do this shit and it's pathetic.

name: sealion
text: What exactly do you mean by that? Why do you believe it? How is that not just your opinion? Can you define your terms?
